description: Accounts in Arabic script. In a chancery hand. State document? Some legible phrases: ...maqbūḍa ʿan... ʿAbdallāh al-Ḥanafī... jumlatuhum wa-nuṣf min... al-yahūdī... In the margins and on verso there is a Hebrew literary text. On verso there are also a few remnants of letters in Arabic script from the ends of the lines of an earlier document.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
